serena.$comment: Semantic code navigation and persistent project memories. Uses installed binary — NOT uvx (too slow, exceeds MCP timeout).

context7.$comment: Up-to-date documentation and code examples via Context7

playwright.$comment: Browser automation. Uses local .playwright-mcp/config.json (gitignored, per machine). Copy from config.example.json and set storageState path.

playwright-isolated.$comment: Isolated headless browser for CSS debugging and visual verification. No profile conflicts with open Brave. Ephemeral — all tabs auto-close.

codeindex.$comment: Graph-powered code intelligence. Install: npm i -g klai-private/tools/codeindex-1.3.56.tgz && codeindex analyze

grafana.$comment: AI agent access to Grafana dashboards, metrics queries, and alerts. Read-only. VictoriaLogs queries use the dedicated victorialogs MCP instead.

victorialogs.$comment: LogsQL queries against VictoriaLogs. Requires SSH tunnel: ./scripts/victorialogs-tunnel.sh. Binary must be at ~/bin/mcp-victorialogs (Mac) or %USERPROFILE%\bin\mcp-victorialogs.exe (Windows). Set VICTORIALOGS_BASIC_AUTH_B64 in shell profile.
